data.name: GeneralError
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: RecordNotFound
data.value: Requested record was not found.

data.name: InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid email or password.

data.name: Unauthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to access this resource.

data.name: Forbidden
data.value: Access to this resource is forbidden.

data.name: InternalServerError
data.value: Internal server error. Please try again later.

data.name: DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred.

data.name: InvalidToken
data.value: Provided token is invalid or expired.

data.name: UnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

data.name: UserAlreadyExists
data.value: User with this email already exists.

data.name: InvalidRefreshToken
data.value: Invalid or expired refresh token.

data.name: InvalidResetToken
data.value: Invalid or expired reset token.

data.name: InvalidRole
data.value: Selected role is invalid.

data.name: TemplateInactive
data.value: Template is inactive and cannot be selected.

data.name: NoFileUploaded
data.value: No file was uploaded.

data.name: InvalidImageExtension
data.value: Only image files (.jpg, .jpeg, .png, .webp, .gif) are allowed.

data.name: InvalidExcelExtension
data.value: Only Excel files (.xls, .xlsx) are allowed.

data.name: UploadError
data.value: An error occurred during upload: {0}

data.name: FailedToParseExcel
data.value: Failed to parse Excel file: {0}

data.name: NoValidEmployeeRows
data.value: No valid employee rows found in the uploaded file.

data.name: CardAlreadyAssigned
data.value: Card is already assigned.

data.name: CardAlreadyActivated
data.value: Card is already activated.

data.name: CardDeactivated
data.value: Card has been deactivated.

data.name: CardNotYetActivated
data.value: Card is not yet activated.

data.name: RejectionReasonRequired
data.value: A rejection reason is required.

data.name: OrderCannotBeCancelled
data.value: Order cannot be cancelled once processing has started.

data.name: EmployeeCountMismatch
data.value: EmployeeIds count ({0}) must equal Quantity ({1}).

data.name: InvalidStatusTransition
data.value: Cannot transition order from {0} to {1}.

data.name: UserNotAuthenticated
data.value: User is not authenticated.

data.name: ProfileNotFound
data.value: Profile not found.

data.name: CustomCategory
data.value: Custom

data.name: CannotMarkEncoded
data.value: Cannot mark as encoded from status '{0}'.

data.name: CardActivatedSuccessfully
data.value: Card activated successfully.

data.name: DefaultCardOrderName
data.value: Card Order - {0}

data.name: DefaultBulkOrderName
data.value: Bulk Order - {0}

data.name: CompanyNotFound
data.value: Company not found for this tenant.

data.name: TrackingNumberRequired
data.value: Tracking number is required for courier delivery.

data.name: ImportCompleted
data.value: Completed

data.name: SubscriptionExpiredOrMissing
data.value: No active subscription found. Please subscribe to continue.

data.name: MaxEmployeesLimitReached
data.value: Employee limit reached for your current subscription plan.

data.name: ExcelFilesOnly
data.value: Only Excel files (.xlsx, .xls) are supported.

data.name: FileUploadFailed
data.value: Failed to upload the file to storage.

data.name: FailedToDownloadExcel
data.value: Failed to download Excel file from storage: {0}

data.name: ImportRowNameRequired
data.value: Row {0}: Name is required.

data.name: ImportRowEmailRequired
data.value: Row {0}: Email is required.

data.name: ImportRowEmailInvalid
data.value: Row {0}: Email '{1}' is not in a valid format.

data.name: ImportRowEmailDuplicate
data.value: Row {0}: Duplicate email '{1}' found in the import sheet.

data.name: ImportExecutionFailed
data.value: Import execution failed: {0}

data.name: InvalidRequest
data.value: Invalid request payload.

data.name: CurrencyMustBeThreeLetters
data.value: Currency must be exactly 3 alphabetic characters.

data.name: UnitPriceMustBeGreaterThanZero
data.value: UnitPrice must be greater than zero.

data.name: PricingNotConfigured
data.value: Pricing is not configured for card type '{0}'.

data.name: InvalidCardType
data.value: Invalid card type: '{0}'. Supported types are Plastic, Wood, and Metal.

data.name: EmployeesNotFound
data.value: Employees not found: {0}.

data.name: EmployeesMissingProfile
data.value: Employees missing profile: {0}.

data.name: ShippingAddressRequired
data.value: Shipping address is required when delivery method is Courier.

data.name: CardMustHaveProfileToReissue
data.value: The card must be linked to a user profile to be reissued.

data.name: ResetTokenExpired
data.value: Reset token has expired.

data.name: TooManyAuthAttempts
data.value: Too many authentication attempts. Please try again in {0} seconds.

data.name: TooManyForgotPasswordRequests
data.value: Too many forgot password requests. Please try again in {0} seconds.

data.name: TooManyProfileRequests
data.value: Too many requests. Please try again in {0} seconds.

data.name: TooManyCardActivationAttempts
data.value: Too many card activation attempts. Please try again in {0} seconds.

data.name: CardActivationLockedOut
data.value: This IP has been temporarily locked out due to repeated failed card activation attempts. Please try again after {0} minutes.

data.name: TooManyChangePasswordAttempts
data.value: Too many password change attempts. Please try again in {0} seconds.

data.name: ChangePasswordLockedOut
data.value: This IP has been temporarily locked out due to repeated failed password change attempts. Please try again after {0} minutes.

data.name: TooManyLoginAttempts
data.value: Too many login attempts. Please try again in {0} seconds.

data.name: TooManyRegisterAttempts
data.value: Too many registration attempts. Please try again in {0} seconds.

data.name: TooManyResetPasswordAttempts
data.value: Too many password reset attempts. Please try again in {0} seconds.

data.name: InvalidTenantClaim
data.value: Invalid or missing Tenant ID claim.

data.name: TenantNotFound
data.value: The tenant associated with this account does not exist.

data.name: TenantInactive
data.value: The tenant associated with this account is currently inactive.
